name: Notion
one_liner: Connected workspace for notes, docs, databases, and wikis.
auth_note: Internal integration static token, public OAuth 2.0, and personal access tokens (Bearer); confirmed on developers.notion.com.
access_note: Free to create integrations; free Notion plan supports API access.
mcp_note: Official hosted remote MCP server at mcp.notion.com with OAuth and ~13 tools.

name: Airtable
one_liner: Spreadsheet-database hybrid for building custom apps and workflows.
auth_note: Web API uses personal access tokens (Bearer) and OAuth 2.0; introduction page confirms REST semantics but not auth details directly.
access_note: Free plan supports API; PATs created self-serve from account.
mcp_note: No official Airtable MCP found; community/third-party MCP servers exist.

name: Linear
one_liner: Issue tracking and project management for software teams.
auth_note: OAuth 2.0 or personal API keys; confirmed on linear.app/developers.
access_note: Personal API keys free from settings; free plan available.
mcp_note: Official remote MCP server at mcp.linear.app with OAuth 2.1 and 25+ tools.

name: Jira
one_liner: Atlassian issue tracking and agile project management platform.
auth_note: OAuth 2.0 (3LO), Basic auth with API token, and JWT for Connect apps; confirmed on developer.atlassian.com security overview.
access_note: Free Jira Cloud tier; API tokens self-serve, OAuth apps via dev console.
mcp_note: Official Atlassian remote MCP server (mcp.atlassian.com), GA Feb 2026, OAuth 2.1.

name: Asana
one_liner: Work management platform for tasks, projects, and team workflows.
auth_note: Personal access tokens, OAuth 2.0, and OpenID Connect; confirmed on developers.asana.com overview.
access_note: PATs free from developer console; free Asana plan supports API.
mcp_note: Official Asana MCP server documented with tools reference and compatible clients.

name: Monday.com
one_liner: Customizable work OS for project, sales, and dev management.
auth_note: API tokens (admin/member) and OAuth; confirmed GraphQL on developer.monday.com. Does not cover Workforms.
access_note: API token free on all paid plans; free plan API access limited.
mcp_note: Official monday MCP server at mcp.monday.com, OAuth, ~20 tools; all plans.

name: ClickUp
one_liner: All-in-one productivity app for tasks, docs, and goals.
auth_note: Personal token (pk_ prefix) and OAuth 2.0 authorization code; confirmed on developer.clickup.com.
access_note: Personal token free from settings; free ClickUp plan supports API.
mcp_note: No confirmed official ClickUp MCP; community MCP servers exist.

name: Coda
one_liner: Doc-database platform combining documents, tables, and automations.
auth_note: Bearer API token confirmed on coda.io/developers; OAuth not shown on the v1 API page.
access_note: API tokens free from account settings; free Coda plan supports API.
mcp_note: No confirmed official Coda MCP; community/Composio-provided MCP available.

name: Smartsheet
one_liner: Enterprise work management on a spreadsheet-style grid interface.
auth_note: 3-legged OAuth 2.0 and raw API access token (Bearer); confirmed on developers.smartsheet.com auth guide.
access_note: API tokens self-serve but generally require a paid/trial account; no durable free developer tier.
mcp_note: No official or well-known community Smartsheet MCP confirmed.
main_blocker: paid/trial account required to obtain API credentials

name: Harvest
one_liner: Time tracking and invoicing for teams and freelancers.
auth_note: Personal access token with Harvest-Account-Id header, and OAuth 2.0; confirmed on help.getharvest.com API v2 docs.
access_note: PAT self-serve from Developers section; free/limited Harvest plan available.
mcp_note: No official Harvest MCP; Composio provides a Harvest MCP wrapper.
